# PR Setup Instructions

Use this template for manual pull requests when needed.

## Create PR in GitHub

1. Open [kelvinn/kelvinn.github.io](https://github.com/kelvinn/kelvinn.github.io).
2. Click **New pull request**.
3. Set your feature branch as the source and `main` as the base branch.
4. Add a clear title and summary of changes.

## Suggested PR description

```md
## Summary
- [Briefly describe what changed]

## Files changed
- [List key files]

## Test plan
1. [Validation step]
2. [Validation step]
```
